=== 1992-11-09 Van Wezel Performing Arts Center, Sarasota, Florida, USA.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Van Wezel Performing Arts Centre
Sarasota, Florida
November 9, 1992


Source: Audience recording
Lineage: CDR > EAC v.09b4 > WAV > MKW v.97b1 > FLAC   
Taped by: Unidentified taper
Transferred by: Unidentified taper
File size:  646MB FLAC

Additional Sound Master (ASM)
*****************************
Cool Edit 2000 1.1 build 2418 [CE2000]:
statics / drop-outs removed

T-RackS 2.0:
1. Equalizer ON: Gain Control:
	boosted level of LOW corresponding band by +3.8dB (boosting bass a little)
	boosted level of HIGH corresponding band by +6.8dB (boosting vocal(s) sufficiently)
2. Tube-Comp ON: default settings / no changes
3. Multiband-Limiter ON: default settings / no changes

OUTPUT STAGE:
Pre- Level Output Stage: notched up +3.0dB (boosting for better car- and LR listening)
Global Master Fader: -0.2dB

ALL TRACKS MASTERED AT THESE LEVELS by Norway Remaster (yours truly)


01. I Can't Be Satisfied (McKinley/ Morganfield)
02. Pretty Peggy-O (Trad. Arr. Bob Dylan)
03. All Along The Watchtower
04. Dear Landlord
05. Positively 4th Street
06. Simple Twist Of Fate
07. Silvio (Bob Dylan and Robert Hunter)
08. Mama, You Been On My Mind
09. Boots Of Spanish Leather
10. Ballad Of Hollis Brown  
11. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right

12. Cat's In The Well
13. Man In The Long Black Coat
14. The Times They Are A-Changin'
15. Maggie's Farm
16. What Good Am I?
17. Everything Is Broken
18. It Ain't Me, Babe

Concert # 452 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 16 of the 1992 US Fall Tour
1992 concert # 88


Concert # 21 with the 8th Never-Ending Tour band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
John Jackson (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
Ian Wallace (drums)
Winston Watson (drums & percussion)

8-9, 18Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal)
10-11Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal), John Jackson (guitar) & Tony Garnier (bass)
3, 6, 8, 9, 11, 18Bob Dylan harmonica
14Bucky Baxter (electric mandolin)
12Dickie Betts (guitar)


NOTE: Dickie Betts plays guitar in the Allman Brothers Band.
8 new songs (44%) compared to previous concert
1 new song for this tour

Stereo audience recording, 115 minutes

=== Norway ASM.txt
===================
===================
===================
Cool Edit 2000 1.1 build 2418 [CE2000]:
statics / drop-outs removed

Additional Sound Master (ASM) Using T-RackS 2.0:

1. Equalizer ON: Gain Control:
   boosted level of LOW corresponding band by +3.8dB (boosting bass a little)
   boosted level of HIGH corresponding band by +6.8dB (boosting vocal(s) sufficiently)
2. Tube-Comp ON: default settings
3. Multiband-Limiter ON: default settings

OUTPUT STAGE:
Pre- Level Output Stage: notched up +3.0dB (boosting for better car- and LR listening)
Global Master Fader: -0.2dB

ALL TRACKS MASTERED AT THESE LEVELS by Norway Remaster (yours truly)
